items.name: issue
items.doc: Scan issue types and severity levels.

items.name: walker
items.doc: File system walking and source file collection.

items.name: output
items.doc: Output formatting — cargo warnings and ISSUES file.

items.name: project
items.doc: Auto-detection of project kind and layout.

items.name: severity
items.doc: Severity resolver — maps check severity per ProjectKind.

items.name: scan_project
scan_at
items.doc:
Scan a project from CLI/MCP — returns issues and writes `proj/ISSUES`.

Returns `(all_issues, new_count)`.
If the project has no `proj/rulestools.toml` with `[project].kind`,
returns a single Info issue with a registration suggestion.

items.name: scan_super
items.doc:
Scan a super-project — find sub-repos and scan each with its own config.

Returns aggregated issues from all sub-repos with path prefixed by sub-repo name.

items.name: run_scan
items.doc: Core scan logic — collects files, runs all registered checks.
